channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: Colombia president decrees emergency powers to restore order in coca region wracked by rebel combat
item.description: Colombia's President Gustavo Petro has issued a decree giving him emergency powers to restore order in Catatumbo, a coca-growing region wracked by a deadly turf war.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hamas releases names of 4 female hostages to be released next, possibly violates deal
item.description: Hamas says it will release four female IDF soldiers including Karina Ariev, Daniella Gilboa, Naama Levy and Liri Albag in second hostage release in a possible violation of the ceasefire agreement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Netanyahu suggests Israel might not complete its withdrawal from Lebanon by a ceasefire deadline
item.description: JERUSALEM (AP) — Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu suggested Friday that Israel might not withdraw all of its forces from Lebanon by a deadline set in its ceasefire with Hezbollah, and Washington appears prepared to push for an extension.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tens of thousands protest in Slovakia over pro-Russia policies of populist leader Fico
item.description: Tens of thousands of people in Slovakia have gathered at squares and street across the country to voice their opposition to the pro-Russia policies of populist Prime Minister Robert Fico.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Governor of Congo's North Kivu province dies of his wounds in fighting with rebels, authorities say
item.description: GOMA, Congo (AP) — The governor of eastern Congo’s North Kivu province has died from injuries sustained during fighting on the front line, a military spokesman said Friday, as M23 rebels closed in on the provincial capital.
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN KABUMBA and MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DHS greenlights swift deportation for migrants Biden allowed in temporarily
item.description: The acting head of the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is allowing immigration enforcement agents to swiftly deport those who came to the U.S. under multiple pathways established under the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: China's Lunar New Year travel rush kicks into high gear with 9 billion trips expected
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China’s Lunar New Year travel rush has kicked into high gear, with billions of trips expected in coming days for the peak of the 40-day annual mass migration — the world's biggest annual movement of humanity.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UN suspends all trips into Houthi-held areas of Yemen over staffers being detained
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — The United Nations on Friday suspended all travel into areas held by Yemen's Houthi rebels after more of their staff were detained by the rebels. The Houthis have already detained U.N. staffers, as well as individuals associated with the once-open U.S.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Putin echoes Trump's claim that conflict in Ukraine could have been avoided had he been in office
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin has echoed U.S. President Donald Trump’s claim the conflict in Ukraine could have been prevented had he been in the White House in 2022.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Middle East latest: 4 Israeli women soldiers will be next hostages freed from Gaza
item.description: The second batch of Israeli hostages set to be released by Hamas this weekend are four female soldiers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Major storm lashes Ireland and Scotland as hurricane-force winds down power lines and ground flights
item.description: Millions of people in Ireland and northern parts of the U.K. have heeded the advice of authorities to stay at home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Japan's leader says he's preparing for tough negotiations with Trump on maintaining US presence
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, struggling to stabilize his minority government, said Friday he will seek to maintain regional security and prepare for tough negotiations with U.S.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Freedom is bittersweet for Palestinians released from Israeli jails
item.description: RAMALLAH, West Bank (AP) — When Dania Hanatsheh was released from an Israeli jail this week and dropped off by bus into a sea of jubilant Palestinians in Ramallah, it was an uncomfortable déjà vu.
item.dc:creator: SAM MEDNICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How the Israel-Hamas ceasefire deal will unfold
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — Israeli troops have pulled back to the edges of Gaza, the first hostages have been released and many Palestinians have returned to what remains of their homes in the first few days of the Israel-Hamas ceasefire deal.
item.dc:creator: LEE KEATH, SAMY MAGDY and ABBY SEWELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump urges Putin to ‘make a deal’ to end the war in Ukraine
item.description: President Trump on Thursday urged Russian President Vladimir Putin to make a deal to end the war in Ukraine, arguing he thinks the latter is ready to negotiate.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Trump: Make products in America or face tariffs
item.description: “Come make your product in America, and we will give you among the lowest taxes of any nation on earth,” Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Survivor of Nova music festival Hamas terror attack wins slot to represent Israel at Eurovision
item.description: Yuval Raphael, survivor of the Nova music festival terrorist attack by Hamas in October 2023, has turned to music to help her process her trauma and will represent Israel in the Eurovision contest.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Haitians demand priority after government spends $3.8M for a brief visit from Colombia's leader
item.description: PORT-AU-PRINCE, Haiti (AP) — The money materialized as soon as Colombia’s president confirmed his visit to southern Haiti.
item.dc:creator: EVENS SANON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scholz's challenger vows tough border rules as attack puts migration in German election spotlight
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Germany's opposition leader vowed Thursday to bar people from entering the country without proper papers and to step up deportations if he is elected chancellor next month, as a knife attack by a rejected asylum-seeker spilled over into an election campaign in which he is the front-run
item.dc:creator: GEIR MOULSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump holds first foreign leader call with Saudi crown prince
item.description: President Trump held his first official call with a foreign leader since being sworn in for his second term with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, a controversial figure who Trump on Thursday praised as a "fantastic guy.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: At least 12 train passengers killed in India after jumping onto tracks to flee alleged fire
item.description: In India, at least 12 train passengers died and at least six others were injured when they jumped out of their train cars to escape a rumored fire and were struck by another train.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Putin reportedly concerned over Russia's economy ahead of possible Trump tariffs
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin is reportedly worried about the state of the country's economy amid threat of tariffs from the U.S. as President Donald Trump returns to Washington.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump talks tough with Putin on ending Ukraine war
item.description: President Trump is turning up the heat on Russian President Vladimir Putin in his first days in power, seeking to pressure Russia’s leader to come to the negotiating table for a deal to end the war in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, The Hill

item.title: Trump redesignates Houthis as foreign terrorist organization
item.description: President Trump on Wednesday directed his administration to relist the Houthis in Yemen as a foreign terrorist organization (FTO) in an effort to crack down on the Iranian-backed militant group.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Panama protests 'threat' of force as Trump pushed to reclaim canal
item.description: The Panamanian government formally raised concerns with the United Nations over President Trump’s threats to retake the Panama Canal, noting any threat of force would violate rules. In a letter to U.N. Secretary General António Guterres, Panama points to U.N.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Taiwan Air Force officer killed after being ‘inhaled’ by fighter jet’s engine
item.description: A Taiwan Air Force officer died after being sucked into the engine of an Indigenous Defense Fighter jet at Ching Chuan Kang Air Base, officials say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Task Force created in Africa to counter terror fears from Iran and jihadi groups
item.description: South Africa’s Chief Rabbi Dr. Warren Goldstein has created an Anti-Terror Task Force to combat terror from Iran and Jihadi groups globally. The group will also try to protect Christians under attack in Africa.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At least 76 people killed in a hotel fire at a ski resort in Turkey
item.description: ANKARA, Turkey (AP) — A fire raged through a 12-story hotel at a popular ski resort in northwestern Turkey early Tuesday during a school holiday, killing at least 76 people — at least two of them when they jumped from the building to escape the flames, officials said.
item.dc:creator: SUZAN FRASER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Putin, Xi vow to ‘deepen’ alliance hours after Trump re-enters the White House
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping and Russian President Vladimir Putin held a video call hours after President Donald Trump re-entered the White House and pledged to "deepen" their partnership.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israeli military launches large-scale counterterrorism operation in West Bank city
item.description: The Israel Defense Forces announced an operation in the West Bank city of Jenin, which is a stronghold for terror organizations backed by Iran.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump wants to visit China, strengthen relationship: Report
item.description: The president-elect has vowed to impose tariffs and other mechanisms against China upon his return to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
